title: Grimorium
description: Harness the forgotten arts and master ritualistic sorcery
body:
# Grimorium

Grimorium is a magic and ritual-themed Minecraft mod originally built with Architectury to support both Fabric and NeoForge. Journey to the End to discover powerful new materials, interact with arcane flora, and perform intricate ritual crafting using specialized magical blocks.

## 📖 Description

Grimorium focuses on a unique ritual crafting mechanic driven by an **Altar** and **Pedestals**. By placing a catalyst item on the Altar and supplying the correct ingredients on the adjacent Pedestals, you can forge powerful new tools and items. Additionally, the mod enlivens the world with strange new arcana and deep-end materials designed for end-game expansion. 

## ✨ Features & Content

### 🌍 World Generation
* **Grimor Ore**: A rare, sturdy ore that can only be found scattered throughout the End dimensions.
* **Arcane Flora**: Discover Arcane Trees that feature dripping, magical particles.

### 🧱 Blocks
* **Altar**: The core of the ritual crafting system. Holds a catalyst for your magical crafting recipes.
* **Pedestal**: Used in conjunction with the Altar to hold secondary ingredients.
* **Stand**: A block that render an item when interacted with.
* **Arcane Wood Set**: Includes Arcane Logs, Leaves, Saplings, Planks, Slabs, Stairs, Fences, and Fence Gates.

### 💎 Materials & Items
* **Grimor Scrap**: Dropped or processed from Grimor Ore.
* **Grimor Ingot**: Ccrafted from Grimor Scraps and Diamonds to be used for ultimate endgame gear.
* **Grimor Upgrade Smithing Template**: A template used in the Smithing Table to forge the powerful Grimor equipment.

### ⚔️ Tools & Weapons
* **Grimor Toolset**: A powerful late-game tier crafted using Grimor Ingots.
  * Grimor Sword
  * Grimor Pickaxe
  * Grimor Axe
  * Grimor Shovel
  * Grimor Hoe

### 📦 Dependencies
* **Architectury API**: Required for cross-loader support across both Fabric and NeoForge.
* **TerraBlender**: Required to support the custom world and biome generation features.
